jokes.text: 'Cause I know what it means Totally and completely badass.
jokes.setup: Mac's overly serious delivery about pyrotechnics making him badass
jokes.punchline: The grammatically broken and juvenile phrasing undermines his attempt at coolness
jokes.explanation: Establishes Mac's delusional self-perception through awkward phrasing

jokes.text: - Oh, Jesus. - You see what I was going for, right? - How badass is that?
jokes.setup: Mac's elaborate pyrotechnic stunt goes wrong
jokes.punchline: Mac immediately seeks validation despite obvious failure
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment - Mac's desperate need for approval overrides obvious failure

jokes.text: when I wasn't around, I saw him smashing one. Smashing it?
jokes.setup: Mac describes Charlie's seemingly contradictory behavior
jokes.punchline: The logical impossibility of seeing something when you weren't around
jokes.explanation: Subtle absurdist humor highlighting Mac's poor storytelling

jokes.text: Well, I mean, you banged the waitress. do I even have to explain that to you? That kind of rubbed me the wrong way, dude.
jokes.setup: Dennis explains why Charlie isn't his best friend
jokes.punchline: Charlie's unintentional sexual innuendo with 'rubbed me the wrong way'
jokes.explanation: Mild wordplay that fits Charlie's obliviousness

jokes.text: Dennis declaring Mac his 'best friend' right in front of Charlie, causing immediate awkward tension
jokes.setup: Charlie is standing right there as Dennis makes this declaration
jokes.punchline: The immediate social awkwardness and Charlie's obvious hurt feelings
jokes.explanation: Classic cringe comedy - social boundary violation that makes everyone uncomfortable

jokes.text: I'm thunder struck. I didn't mean to thunder strike you
jokes.setup: Charlie says he's thunderstruck by the best friend revelation
jokes.punchline: Dennis mishears/corrects it as 'thunder strike' creating nonsense
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Dennis's ego and poor listening

jokes.text: Charlie's dramatic reaction: 'I'm thunder struck'
jokes.setup: Charlie is hurt by Dennis choosing Mac over him
jokes.punchline: Uses 'thunder struck' instead of 'thunderstruck' - classic Charlie malapropism
jokes.explanation: Perfect Charlie moment - his unique speech patterns make common phrases funny

jokes.text: Because you and I are best friends.
jokes.setup: Mac immediately agrees to help Dennis after being declared best friend
jokes.punchline: Mac's desperate eagerness to please and need for validation
jokes.explanation: Perfectly captures Mac's pathetic need for friendship validation

jokes.text: He's on to us.
jokes.setup: After Mac declares loyalty, scene cuts to Dennis speaking
jokes.punchline: Reveals Dennis is manipulating Mac, subverting the friendship moment
jokes.explanation: Excellent structural joke - immediate reveal that Dennis is scheming

jokes.text: Dennis's desperate attempt to bond with Charlie: 'that's what friends do: they let each other stay at each other's apartments, and they hang out with each other'
jokes.setup: Dennis trying to win back Charlie's friendship
jokes.punchline: His awkward, mechanical description of what friendship is supposed to be
jokes.explanation: Good character work - Dennis's complete inability to understand genuine human connection

jokes.text: yeah... I was going to stay in Mac's room. I'm sure he wouldn't mind.
jokes.setup: Charlie offers his room to Dennis
jokes.punchline: Dennis's casual assumption about using Mac's space shows his entitlement
jokes.explanation: Shows Dennis's casual disregard for boundaries

jokes.text: Well, I mean there's... 24 beers there, if I'm counting right. - 12 for me and 12 for Mac.
jokes.setup: Charlie counts the beers Dennis brought
jokes.punchline: Dennis's rigid mathematical division excludes Charlie entirely
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis behavior - precise selfishness presented as logic

jokes.text: That's kind of foreign, so... I got Clue... Complicated stuff there. I don't like counting.
jokes.setup: Charlie suggests increasingly simple games
jokes.punchline: Dennis finds excuses to reject everything, even simple counting
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation showing Dennis's dismissiveness and laziness

jokes.text: Not that many times. If you get it once, you've won the game. So... you're... Kind of in... I'm in your way.
jokes.setup: Charlie tries to explain Connect Four isn't complex
jokes.punchline: Dennis's complete disengagement creates awkward trailing off
jokes.explanation: Great awkward moment showing conversational breakdown

jokes.text: The awkward physical comedy of Charlie and Dennis bumping into each other and repeatedly saying 'I'm in your way'
jokes.setup: Two people trying to move around each other
jokes.punchline: They get stuck in that awkward dance where both people move the same way
jokes.explanation: Standard physical comedy moment - recognizable but not particularly creative

jokes.text: Oh, cool. Did you get one for me? I did... not.
jokes.setup: Charlie asks if Dennis got him a walkie-talkie too
jokes.punchline: Dennis's pause before cruel honesty
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis moment - calculated cruelty delivered deadpan

jokes.text: - What are you doing? - Popping my pants off. - Why? - Because we're gonna bang.
jokes.setup: Mac suddenly starts undressing
jokes.punchline: His matter-of-fact announcement about sex with no romantic buildup
jokes.explanation: Great Mac moment - zero social awareness about intimacy

jokes.text: Mac's casual 'Popping my pants off' as preparation for sex with the waitress
jokes.setup: Mac and the waitress about to have sex
jokes.punchline: Mac's overly casual, mechanical approach to intimacy
jokes.explanation: Decent character moment showing Mac's unromantic, crude approach to everything

jokes.text: Why would I wear a condom...? Do you really not wear condoms when you have sex with strangers?
jokes.setup: Discussion about condom use
jokes.punchline: Mac's casual admission of risky sexual behavior
jokes.explanation: Shows Mac's recklessness and poor decision-making

jokes.text: Mac's horrified reaction to the waitress wanting conditions: 'I'll wear the goddamn condom, but I'm not psyched about it'
jokes.setup: The waitress has requirements for their hookup
jokes.punchline: Mac immediately assumes it's about condoms and is openly resentful
jokes.explanation: Good character-specific grossness - Mac's attitude reveals his terrible approach to women

jokes.text: It's mostly that horrible angle that you see in porns, you know, where it's all balls and male ass
jokes.setup: Mac describes Dennis's sex tape collection
jokes.punchline: Graphic description of unflattering pornographic angles
jokes.explanation: Crude but character-appropriate observation

jokes.text: Friend one, best friend two, come in. Over. I'm gonna take this, and then, maybe a little bit later we could do some hand stuff.
jokes.setup: Professional walkie-talkie communication
jokes.punchline: Mac immediately shifts to juvenile sexual proposition
jokes.explanation: Good tonal whiplash between serious and juvenile

jokes.text: Don. Don. Typical. Did you get a last name on this chump? Yeah, Johnson. Yeah, sounds like a real sucker.
jokes.setup: Dennis asks for details about the guy Mac supposedly fought
jokes.punchline: Mac gives the obviously fake name 'Don Johnson'
jokes.explanation: Good setup for later revelation - obvious TV reference

jokes.text: Don Johnson's the dude from Miami Vice, Charlie. I'm sure there's plenty of Don Johnsons running around Philly, dude.
jokes.setup: Dennis points out the obvious celebrity reference
jokes.punchline: Charlie's oblivious defense of the coincidence
jokes.explanation: Perfect Charlie naivety - missing obvious deception

jokes.text: They smell really bad. Really bad. I'm surprised you've been able to be in here for this long without cracking a window or something.
jokes.setup: Discussion of Mac's smelly socks
jokes.punchline: Escalating agreement about how terrible the smell is
jokes.explanation: Basic escalation humor, functional but not special

jokes.text: I think Mac's banging the waitress. And when he breaks your heart, I'll be here to pick up the pieces
jokes.setup: Dennis plants suspicion about Mac
jokes.punchline: Reveals his manipulative plan to position himself as Charlie's savior
jokes.explanation: Excellent Dennis manipulation - calculated emotional manipulation

jokes.text: Dennis's dramatic accusation: 'I think Mac's banging the waitress' followed by his friendship pitch
jokes.setup: Dennis has been manipulating the situation all along
jokes.punchline: He pretends to figure out what he's been orchestrating
jokes.explanation: Good dramatic irony and character work - Dennis's manipulative nature in action

jokes.text: I hate all the pizza. And I had to drink all the beer. You must be wasted, dude. 24 beers by yourself?
jokes.setup: Charlie claims to have consumed everything meant for Mac
jokes.punchline: The mathematical impossibility and Charlie's poor acting
jokes.explanation: Good Charlie moment - obvious lie delivered poorly

jokes.text: 'Cause that would be... a terrible thing to do... to your best friend.
jokes.setup: Discussion about not peeing on the couch
jokes.punchline: Charlie's pointed emphasis on 'best friend' with obvious hostility
jokes.explanation: Good passive-aggressive delivery showing Charlie's hurt feelings

jokes.text: The callback to Charlie pissing on the couch: 'if you piss on the couch again, you're gonna buy us a new couch'
jokes.setup: Charlie sleeping on the couch while drunk
jokes.punchline: Casual reference to Charlie's previous couch-pissing incident
jokes.explanation: Standard running gag humor - establishes Charlie's gross living habits

jokes.text: You've been banging the waitress? How'd you know that? You're my blood brother, man. I know more about you than you know about yourself.
jokes.setup: Mac confesses to Dennis
jokes.punchline: Dennis's ridiculous claim about psychic blood brother connection
jokes.explanation: Great Dennis grandiosity covering obvious listening skills

jokes.text: What is this? What am I seeing? Nothing, man. You're having a dream right now. You sure? 'Cause I feel like I'm awake.
jokes.setup: Charlie catches Mac and Dennis with walkie-talkies
jokes.punchline: Their ridiculous attempt to convince him he's dreaming
jokes.explanation: Absurd gaslighting attempt that's transparently ridiculous

jokes.text: So, what I did is I planted that walkie-talkie that Mac gave me in my bedroom. We're gonna switch your walkie to that channel
jokes.setup: Dennis explains his surveillance plan
jokes.punchline: His elaborate scheme to spy on Mac's supposed infidelity
jokes.explanation: Shows Dennis's manipulative planning and tech surveillance

jokes.text: "Waitress." One star. Not good.
jokes.setup: Dennis checks his sex tape filing system
jokes.punchline: He's rated the waitress only one star out of five
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis moment - clinical sexual scoring system

jokes.text: 'Cause I turned it off. What do you mean, you turned it off? I don't want to listen to this, man!
jokes.setup: They should be hearing Mac and the waitress on the walkie
jokes.punchline: Dennis admits he turned it off because he can't handle listening
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Dennis's limits and jealousy

jokes.text: Let's put it this way, you won't be able to see anybody's face, you know what I'm saying? Oh, it's the low down...
jokes.setup: Dennis explains why the video won't be good evidence
jokes.punchline: Callback to the earlier 'balls and male ass' angle discussion
jokes.explanation: Solid callback to earlier visual comedy setup

jokes.text: You got to be behind me. I got to have you behind me. I think I want to be in front of you. No, no. You got to be behind me.
jokes.setup: Mac insists on specific positioning
jokes.punchline: His oddly specific sexual requirements disguised as strategy
jokes.explanation: Awkward sexual specificity disguised as tactical planning

jokes.text: Well... Mac's gay.
jokes.setup: After overhearing Mac's specific positioning requirements
jokes.punchline: Dennis's matter-of-fact conclusion about Mac's sexuality
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan delivery of obvious conclusion - excellent economy

jokes.text: He wants to be you getting banged by me in your apartment. It's like role-play!
jokes.setup: Charlie theorizes about Mac's motivations
jokes.punchline: His excited realization about the twisted role-play scenario
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of the absurd psychological analysis

jokes.text: If I get all balled up and small, I get too high, and you'll see that there's someone in the bed. the further and wider I go, the flatter I become, like a starfish, you know?
jokes.setup: Dennis explains his hiding strategy
jokes.punchline: His ridiculous physics explanation for becoming starfish-shaped
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurd logic - pseudo-scientific approach to hiding

jokes.text: the further and wider I go, the flatter I become, like a starfish, you know?
jokes.setup: Dennis explains his hiding strategy in bed
jokes.punchline: His bizarre starfish metaphor for flattening himself
jokes.explanation: Wonderfully absurd visual. Dennis's confident explanation of an insane hiding strategy creates great absurdist humor.

jokes.text: I would never say it to his face, but Dennis has great thighs.
jokes.setup: Mac explains why Dennis's jeans are tight
jokes.punchline: Unprompted compliment about Dennis's body while in drag
jokes.explanation: Perfect Mac moment - homoerotic observation delivered earnestly

jokes.text: We busted you! Caught! You are busted! Because you look pretty busted.
jokes.setup: Dennis and Charlie think they've caught Mac in the act
jokes.punchline: Mac turns 'busted' back on them, noting their disheveled appearance
jokes.explanation: Good wordplay reversal in confrontation scene

jokes.text: It was my thighs, dude, it's always been my thighs. Were you guys humping?
jokes.setup: Argument about whose thighs Mac was complimenting
jokes.punchline: Charlie's direct question about the physical activity
jokes.explanation: Good callback with Charlie's blunt question

jokes.text: I thought it was one of Mac's Project Bad ass tapes, so I pop it in the VCR to watch it, I see what it is, I become violently ill, okay? Then I start smashing.
jokes.setup: Charlie explains why he destroyed the sex tape
jokes.punchline: The escalation from curiosity to violent illness to destruction
jokes.explanation: Great payoff explaining the opening mystery with perfect escalation

jokes.text: I love Project Bad ass. I watch those tapes all the time.
jokes.setup: Mac thought Charlie hated his videos
jokes.punchline: Charlie reveals he actually loves and regularly watches them
jokes.explanation: Perfect resolution of opening conflict with character consistency

jokes.text: Charlie's enthusiastic endorsement: 'What, dude? I love Project Bad ass. I watch those tapes all the time'
jokes.setup: Mac thinking Charlie hates his videos
jokes.punchline: Charlie genuinely enjoys Mac's terrible amateur stunts
jokes.explanation: Good character moment - Charlie's simple-minded appreciation for Mac's awful videos

jokes.text: You got weird balls. You should see Frank's balls. They're like planets.
jokes.setup: Charlie comments on Mac's anatomy from the tapes
jokes.punchline: Escalates to astronomical comparison of Frank's anatomy
jokes.explanation: Good escalation with vivid, absurd imagery

jokes.text: Mac's ball commentary: 'You got weird balls' and Dennis's response: 'You should see Frank's balls. They're like planets'
jokes.setup: Discussion of Dennis's sex tapes
jokes.punchline: Escalating from weird balls to planet-sized balls
jokes.explanation: Good escalation with vivid, disgusting imagery that's both specific and absurd

jokes.text: The three... Musketeers! Blind mice! The three... Stooges. I don't want to be associated with those...
jokes.setup: They try to name their three-person friendship
jokes.punchline: Dennis's horror at being compared to the Three Stooges
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Dennis's vanity about image

jokes.text: Hey, man, do you still get the feeling he wants to bang us? Oh, yeah. Yeah, definitely. That's what this is all about, huh?
jokes.setup: They watch Mac's latest Project Badass video
jokes.punchline: Their continued belief that Mac's videos are sexual displays for them
jokes.explanation: Good callback that maintains the running misunderstanding
